data.name: CannotFindExpectedCrashDumpFile
data.value: Expected crash dump file '{0}' could not be found, all files matching the '*.dmp' pattern will be copied to the result folder
data.comment: 0 is the expected crash dump file path. Do not localize file pattern {Locked="*.dmp"}.

data.name: CannotFindExpectedCrashReportFile
data.value: Expected crash report file '{0}' could not be found, all files matching the '{1}' pattern will be copied to the result folder
data.comment: {0} is the expected crash report file path. {1} is the crash report file search pattern.

data.name: CrashDumpArtifactDescription
data.value: The testhost process crash dump file

data.name: CrashDumpArtifactDisplayName
data.value: Crash dump file

data.name: CrashDumpDescription
data.value: [net6.0+ only] Produce crash dump files when the test execution process crashes unexpectedly
data.comment: Do not localize target framework moniker {Locked="net6.0+"}.

data.name: CrashDumpDisplayName
data.value: Crash dump

data.name: CrashDumpFileNameOptionDescription
data.value: Specify the name of the dump file
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crashdump-filename"} or file extension {Locked=".dmp"}.

data.name: CrashDumpInvalidEnvironmentVariableValueErrorMessage
data.value: Environment variable '{0}' should have been set to '{1}' but value is '{2}'
data.comment: {0} is the environment variable name. {1} is the expected value. {2} is the actual value.

data.name: CrashDumpSequenceArtifactDescription
data.value: The list of tests that started and ended during the test session, used to identify the tests that were running at the time of the crash

data.name: CrashDumpSequenceArtifactDisplayName
data.value: Crash sequence file

data.name: CrashDumpSequenceFileReadError
data.value: Failed to read the crash sequence file '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is the crash sequence file path. {1} is the error message.

data.name: CrashDumpTestsRunningAtCrash
data.value: The following tests were still running when the test host crashed (format: [<time-elapsed-since-start>] <name>):

data.name: CrashSequenceOptionDescription
data.value: Control whether a sequence file listing the tests started and ended during the test session is generated alongside the crash dump or crash report. The file makes it possible to identify the tests that were running at the time of the crash without having to inspect the dump. Valid values are 'on' (default; also accepts 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (also accepts 'false', 'disable', '0').
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crash-sequence"} or option values {Locked="on"}{Locked="true"}{Locked="enable"}{Locked="1"}{Locked="off"}{Locked="false"}{Locked="disable"}{Locked="0"}.

data.name: CrashSequenceOptionInvalidArgument
data.value: --crash-sequence expects a single parameter with value 'on' (or 'true', 'enable', '1') or 'off' (or 'false', 'disable', '0').
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crash-sequence"} or option values {Locked="on"}{Locked="true"}{Locked="enable"}{Locked="1"}{Locked="off"}{Locked="false"}{Locked="disable"}{Locked="0"}.

data.name: MissingCrashDumpMainOption
data.value: You specified one or more crash dump parameters but did not enable crash dumps. Add --crashdump or --crash-report to the command line.
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--crashdump"}{Locked="--crash-report"}.

data.name: CrashDumpNotSupportedInNonNetCoreErrorMessage
data.value: Crash dump feature is only available in .NET (Core)
data.comment: Do not localize {Locked=".NET (Core)"}.

data.name: CrashDumpOptionDescription
data.value: [net6.0+ only] Generate a dump file if the test process crashes
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crashdump"} or target framework moniker {Locked="net6.0+"}.

data.name: CrashDumpProcessCrashed
data.value: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, but the expected diagnostic artifact(s) were not produced
data.comment: {0} is the crashed test host process ID.

data.name: CrashDumpProcessCrashedDumpAndReportFileCreated
data.value: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, a dump file and crash report were generated
data.comment: {0} is the crashed test host process ID.

data.name: CrashDumpProcessCrashedDumpFileCreated
data.value: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, a dump file was generated
data.comment: {0} is the crashed test host process ID.

data.name: CrashDumpProcessCrashedReportFileCreated
data.value: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, a crash report was generated
data.comment: {0} is the crashed test host process ID.

data.name: CrashDumpTypeOptionDescription
data.value: Specify the type of the dump. Valid values are 'Mini', 'Heap', 'Triage' or 'Full'. Default type is 'Full'. For more information visit https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/diagnostics/collect-dumps-crash#types-of-mini-dumps
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crashdump-type"}, dump type values {Locked="Mini"}{Locked="Heap"}{Locked="Triage"}{Locked="Full"}, or link {Locked="https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/diagnostics/collect-dumps-crash#types-of-mini-dumps"}.

data.name: CrashDumpTypeOptionInvalidType
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid dump type. Valid options are 'Mini', 'Heap', 'Triage' and 'Full'
data.comment: 0 is the invalid dump type. Do not localize dump type values {Locked="Mini"}{Locked="Heap"}{Locked="Triage"}{Locked="Full"}.

data.name: CrashDumpTypeOptionTooManyArguments
data.value: '--crashdump-type' expects a single dump type as argument (e.g. '--crashdump-type Heap')
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crashdump-type"} or example command {Locked="--crashdump-type Heap"}.

data.name: CrashReportAndIfSupportedAreMutuallyExclusiveErrorMessage
data.value: '--crash-report' and '--crash-report-if-supported' are mutually exclusive. Use '--crash-report-if-supported' to opt into a best-effort crash report that is silently skipped on platforms where it is not supported, or '--crash-report' to fail fast when the option cannot be honored.
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--crash-report"}{Locked="--crash-report-if-supported"}.

data.name: CrashReportArtifactDescription
data.value: The testhost process crash report file

data.name: CrashReportArtifactDisplayName
data.value: Crash report file

data.name: CrashReportIfSupportedIgnoredOnNetFrameworkInfoMessage
data.value: '--crash-report-if-supported' was specified but is being ignored on this runtime: the .NET Framework testhost does not support the runtime-based crash dump / crash report mechanism. No crash report file will be produced.
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crash-report-if-supported"} or runtime name {Locked=".NET Framework"}.

data.name: CrashReportIfSupportedIgnoredOnWindowsInfoMessage
data.value: '--crash-report-if-supported' was specified but is being ignored on this platform: the .NET runtime ignores the underlying 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReport' and 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReportOnly' environment variables on Windows (see https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/80191). No crash report file will be produced.
data.comment: Do not localize option name {Locked="--crash-report-if-supported"}, environment variable names {Locked="DOTNET_EnableCrashReport"}{Locked="DOTNET_EnableCrashReportOnly"}, platform name {Locked="Windows"}, or link {Locked="https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/80191"}.

data.name: CrashReportIfSupportedOptionDescription
data.value: Same as '--crash-report' but silently ignored (with an informational message) on platforms where crash report generation is not supported. Use this option to keep the same command line across CI matrices that include Windows. Mutually exclusive with '--crash-report'.
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--crash-report"}{Locked="--crash-report-if-supported"} or platform name {Locked="Windows"}.

data.name: CrashReportNotSupportedOnWindowsErrorMessage
data.value: '--crash-report' is not supported on Windows because the .NET runtime ignores the underlying 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReport' and 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReportOnly' environment variables on this platform. See https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/80191. Use '--crash-report-if-supported' to silently skip the option on Windows, or '--crashdump' to generate a crash dump file instead.
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--crash-report"}{Locked="--crash-report-if-supported"}{Locked="--crashdump"}, environment variable names {Locked="DOTNET_EnableCrashReport"}{Locked="DOTNET_EnableCrashReportOnly"}, platform name {Locked="Windows"}, runtime name {Locked=".NET"}, or link {Locked="https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/80191"}.

data.name: CrashReportOptionDescription
data.value: [Linux/macOS only] Generate a JSON crash report when the test process crashes. Combine with '--crashdump' to also generate a dump file. Requires .NET 7+ when used alone; .NET 6+ when combined with '--crashdump'. This runtime requirement is not enforced by the tool: on unsupported runtimes no crash report will be emitted. Not supported on Windows due to a .NET runtime limitation (dotnet/runtime#80191); use '--crash-report-if-supported' to silently skip the option there.
data.comment: Do not localize option names {Locked="--crash-report"}{Locked="--crash-report-if-supported"}{Locked="--crashdump"}, platforms {Locked="Linux"}{Locked="macOS"}{Locked="Windows"}, format name {Locked="JSON"}, runtime name {Locked=".NET"}, target framework versions {Locked=".NET 7+"}{Locked=".NET 6+"}, or issue reference {Locked="dotnet/runtime#80191"}.

data.name: UnsupportedRequestTypeErrorMessage
data.value: Requests of type '{0}' is not supported
data.comment: {0} is the unsupported request type name.
